name: SteamOS
description: SteamOS 3 is an Arch-based, immutable operating system developed by Valve for the Steam Deck. It features a custom Game Mode based on Gamescope, providing a handheld console interface, and a standard KDE Plasma desktop for traditional PC use. It leverages Flatpak for applications and provides a seamless, validated gaming experience through Proton. It is designed for reliability and ease of use in gaming-centric hardware.
